name: web2vr-expert-a-adaptations
description: Expert A: ten WebXR story adaptations (NYT) packaged for local HTTPS and headset testing.

scripts.check: node --check spain-germany-world-cup-goal/webxr-adaptation/tools/build-story-instance.mjs && node --check spain-germany-world-cup-goal/webxr-adaptation/src/main.js && node --check canada-belgium-world-cup-goal-batshuayi/webxr-adaptation/tools/build-story-instance.mjs && node --check canada-belgium-world-cup-goal-batshuayi/webxr-adaptation/src/main.js && node --check usa-weston-mckennie-england/webxr-adaptation/tools/build-story-instance.mjs && node --check usa-weston-mckennie-england/webxr-adaptation/src/main.js && node --check chinatown-virtual-walk-tour/webxr-adaptation/src/main.js && node --check wear-mask-covid-particles-ul-fr/webxr-adaptation/src/main.js && node --check coronavirus-transmission-cough-6-feet-ar-ul/webxr-adaptation/src/main.js && node --check apollo-11-moon-landing-photos-ul/webxr-adaptation/src/main.js && node --check super-typhoon-mangkhut-ompong-storm/webxr-adaptation/src/main.js && node --check guatemala-volcano-augmented-reality-ar-ul/webxr-adaptation/src/main.js && node --check mars-nasa-insight-ar-3d-ul/webxr-adaptation/src/main.js && python3 -m py_compile https_server.py
scripts.build:all: npm run build:spain-webxr && npm run build:belgium-webxr && npm run build:mckennie-webxr
